<?php namespace Illuminate\Database; use InvalidArgumentException; class SQLiteDatabaseDoesNotExistException extends InvalidArgumentException { /** * The path to the database. * * @var string */ public $path; /** * Create a new exception instance. * * @param string $path */ public function __construct($path) { parent::__construct("Database file at path [{$path}] does not exist. Ensure this is an absolute path to the database."); $this->path = $path; } }
